---
title: "DEN Color Palette v1.0"
subtitle: "Quick Reference"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry:
      - margin=1.5cm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{array}
---

\thispagestyle{empty}

```{=latex}
\begin{table}[h]
\centering
\caption{DEN Data Visualization Color Palette (v1.0)}
\begin{tabular}{clllll}
\toprule
\textbf{Pos} & \textbf{Name} & \textbf{Hex} & \textbf{Tier} & \textbf{Source} & \textbf{Swatch} \\
\midrule
1  & Gold        & \texttt{\#EEC051} & Core     & Official  & \colorbox[HTML]{EEC051}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
2  & Dark Brown  & \texttt{\#845B24} & Core     & Official  & \colorbox[HTML]{845B24}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
3  & Red         & \texttt{\#C00000} & Core     & Chartbook & \colorbox[HTML]{C00000}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
\midrule
4  & Bright Gold & \texttt{\#FFC000} & Standard & Chartbook & \colorbox[HTML]{FFC000}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
5  & Tan         & \texttt{\#A19574} & Standard & Derived   & \colorbox[HTML]{A19574}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
6  & Dark Grey   & \texttt{\#3A3A3A} & Standard & Essential & \colorbox[HTML]{3A3A3A}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
7  & Deep Amber  & \texttt{\#935200} & Standard & Chartbook & \colorbox[HTML]{935200}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
\midrule
8  & Light Gold  & \texttt{\#F8E69B} & Extended & Official  & \colorbox[HTML]{F8E69B}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
9  & Warm Sand   & \texttt{\#C3986D} & Extended & Derived   & \colorbox[HTML]{C3986D}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
10 & Rose Brown  & \texttt{\#B58B80} & Extended & Derived   & \colorbox[HTML]{B58B80}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
11 & Rust        & \texttt{\#9F522C} & Extended & Chartbook & \colorbox[HTML]{9F522C}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
12 & Olive Tan   & \texttt{\#8B8679} & Extended & Derived   & \colorbox[HTML]{8B8679}{\hspace{2cm}\vphantom{X}} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
```

\vspace{0.5cm}

**Colormaps:**

- **Sequential:** `#F8E69B` → `#EEC051` → `#845B24`
- **Diverging:** `#EEC051` ← `#F8E69B` → `#C00000`

\vspace{0.5cm}

**Quick usage guide:**

| Chart type             | Colors                                         |
|------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| 2-series               | Gold + Dark Brown (pos 1--2)                    |
| 3-series               | Gold + Dark Brown + Red (pos 1--3)              |
| Bar + line combo       | Bars: Gold + Bright Gold, Line: Dark Brown      |
| Stacked bar (4--6)     | Pos 1, 4, 2, 7 (light-dark alternation)        |
| Many categories (8+)   | Full 12-color palette                           |

\vspace{0.5cm}

**Packages:** [fig-den](https://github.com/den-econ/fig-den) (Python, v1.0), [ggden](https://github.com/den-econ/ggden) (R, v1.0), and [den-scheme](https://github.com/den-econ/den-scheme) (Stata, v1.0)
